heading: Availability of funds for acquisition of lands, etc., within added area
label: 541e Availability of funds for acquisition of lands, etc., within added area
text: Notwithstanding the provisions of , moneys appropriated from the Land and Water Conservation Fund shall be available for the acquisition of any lands, waters, or interests therein within the area added to the Siuslaw National Forest by this subchapter.section 200306(a)(2) of title 54
notes: Amendments2014— substituted “” for “section 460–9(a)(1) of this title”.Pub. L. 113–287section 200306(a)(2) of title 54l
amendments: Amendments2014— substituted “” for “section 460–9(a)(1) of this title”.Pub. L. 113–287section 200306(a)(2) of title 54l
